notes: Pulsar — pipes, && / || chaining, .rps scripting, startup + scheduled tasks, recovery tools, OTA updates, wifi autoconnect, ntp sync, owner/timezone, FileExp explorer, admin users, compiled .mpy image option.
features: Shell: pipes, && / || chaining, .rps scripting, persistent aliases, word-wise editing
Automation: startup tasks, scheduled tasks, headless autonomy mode
Filesystem: streamed cp/mv, du, multi-file cat, FileExp TUI explorer
Networking: wget progress bars, extended curl, wifi autoconnect, ntp sync
Updates: OTA check/online, preserve-data installs, source or compiled .mpy images
Recovery: fscheck, diag, logdump, regreset, pkgdisable
Personalisation: owner, timezone, device id, idle logout
Users: admin roles, nopass accounts, protected root/guest, admin-gated actions
